svg.title: Pipeline 4 Release — Sub-pipelines
svg.desc: Release pipeline và 6 sub-pipelines chạy bên trong các pipeline chính.

g.text: or: N closed intents hit milestone target
gather all closed intents since last release
validate all graph nodes vs schema
called before each kbx apply in P1:execute
write evidence metadata on touched nodes
diff: logic changes vs NL changes

svg.text: P1:retro calls retro:write · P1+P2+P4 call chaos:scan
